name: Lucinda's Stuffing
recipeIngredient: 1 lb fresh mushrooms or 8 oz canned mushrooms, sliced
1 tsp poultry seasonings (vegan), more to taste
1 large bag of Pepperidge Farms whole wheat/white bread mix stuffing cubes (no added seasonings)
recipeInstructions:
OK, it IS tested, but since I rarely follow recipes exactly all amounts are approximations. This is a very sticky, moist stuffing -- just how I like it. Those of you who prefer the top to be crispy can bake it uncovered for the last few minutes OR broil the top till crispy.
1. In a large pot, heat onions, celery, carrots, mushrooms, and herbs until boiling.
2. Simmer for 5-10 minutes or until chopped onions are translucent.
3. Cool mixture for 10 minutes, then add stuffing cubes.
4. Mix well, adding vegetable broth if necessary for moisture.
5. Place in a large covered baking dish and cook at 350°F (preheated oven) for 30 minutes.
6. Remove the cover during the last 10-15 minutes to get a crusty top.
Variations: You can add browned vegetarian Italian sausage links (if available) for a more traditional taste, chopped apples, or any other vegetables you like.
